ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed romeo coolio at position 2 (16.0% probability) vs top pick Kaid D'authie (18.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~2.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Kaid D'authie > Romeo Coolio, but actual result was Romeo Coolio > Kaid D'authie. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Romeo Coolio had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
